reviews.comment:
1- El taller mecánico tiene unos sobreprecios altísimos y no trabajan bien.
2- El lavadero no es excepcional, pero bastante bueno para un lavado rápido.
3- Muy bueno el servicio de estética automotor (lustre, teflón, pulidos, polarizados, limpieza de tapizados, etc). Todo con 3m. Y para destacar es la atención de ALFREDO, el encargado de la parte estética automotor, lustre, autos inundados, pomarizados, etc. Soluciona cualquier problema rapidísimo y siempre con muchísima amabilidad.
4- La confitería es muy linda, y sirven muy buen café y comidas, con precios altos.

(Translated by Google)
1. The auto repair shop is extremely overpriced and doesn't do a good job.
2. The car wash isn't exceptional, but it's quite good for a quick wash.
3. The auto aesthetics service is very good (polish, Teflon, polishing, window tinting, upholstery cleaning, etc.). All with 3M. And what's particularly noteworthy is the service provided by Alfredo, the person in charge of auto aesthetics, polishing, flooded cars, polishing, etc. He solves any problem very quickly and is always extremely courteous.
4. The bakery is very nice, and they serve very good coffee and food at high prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMVpibmdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy muy mala la atención, los productos de la tienda vencidos, el café malísimo, la gente de vigilancia no tiene ni el más mínimo respeto ni educación. En fin no vuelvo nunca más y le recomendaría a los que me leen no visitar éste lugar jamás. Muy mala experiencia

(Translated by Google)
The service was very, very bad. The store's products were expired, the coffee was terrible, and the security guards were completely disrespectful and uneducated. In short, I'm never going back, and I would recommend to anyone reading this to never visit this place again. A very bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBazhuc3FRRRAB
